source: spec Section 2.6, paths verified against disk; additions per Sandbox Directive and spec Sections 8.7 + 9.1

scripts/apin/.algorithm: sha256(json({rel_path: sha256(file)}, sorted))  # with log_exclusions applied

rebaseline_history.reason: Initial baseline. Captured full directory including 173 historical .log files (reliability_matrix_*, section*_*, apin_server_run.log).

DEC-019: exclude *.log and *.log.* patterns. Runtime log files were causing false drift events whenever the legacy APIN server ran (its own apin_server_run.log lives in the sacred directory). 173 files excluded; 145 remain tracked (source code + checkpoints + non-log artifacts). User-approved 2026-05-01.

rule_outside_table: Per Sandbox Directive, the entire repository outside tomato_sandbox/ is sacred during this spec's implementation. The entries above are the most-important subset for explicit hash tracking.

directory_hash_algorithm_canonical.description: Canonical directory-hash algorithm. Sacred-guardian implementations must match byte-for-byte to avoid false drift.
pseudocode: 2. exclusions = entry.get('log_exclusions', [])  # per-entry; default empty list
3. For each file under directory (os.walk; order does not matter because we sort later):
if any(fnmatch.fnmatch(basename, pat) for pat in exclusions):  continue  # skip excluded
rel_path = relpath(full, dir).replace(os.sep, "/")  # forward slashes always
# IMPORTANT: separators=(",", ":") produces compact JSON without spaces.
# Default json.dumps uses separators=(", ", ": ") which gives different bytes.
directory_hash_algorithm_canonical.exclusions_added_in_DEC_019: log_exclusions field per directory entry; matched via fnmatch against file basename. Currently only scripts/apin/ has exclusions (["*.log", "*.log.*"]). Other directory entries omit the field which means no exclusions applied (default empty list).
directory_hash_algorithm_canonical.reference_implementation_note: See `tomato_progress_reports/phase_0_setup.md` Check 6 (without exclusions) and `tomato_progress_reports/sacred_post_dec019_*.md` (with exclusions; once written).
